subject: Action needed: koi planning in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-3377
body: Here is a progress summary for the koi plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Katherine Johnson as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-3377. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
